name: Cool Create Website
tagline: Turn a rough idea into a simple public website page you can share in minutes.
thesis: Cool Create Website is the lightweight proof that OpenAITPM can take a short, casual idea and turn it into a customer-readable page with a stable URL. The first user is a founder or creator who wants a page before they have a full product spec.
audience: Founders, creators, and operators who need a quick public page for a new idea.
proofPoints: A short prompt becomes a checked-in JSON page with route, thesis, CTAs, proof points, and launch checks.
The route is stable at openAITpm.com/cool-create-website once the branch lands.
The same PR/build workflow validates the page before it reaches production.
